supporting_evidence: Collapse probe shows committed collapse state immediately (`expanded=false`, `detailFrameHeightParam=0.000`, `detailVisibleHeight=0.000`, `visibilityGateOpen=false`).
`rawAnimatableOpacity` decays from 1.000 toward 0.009 while `renderedOpacity` remains 0.000, indicating render gating dominates output rather than state-promotion mismatch.
contradicting_evidence: No evidence of tentative-vs-committed business state divergence; collapse lifecycle completes (`probe.collapse.end`, `animation.complete`) with expected row state.
missing_evidence: A direct expand-session `detailOpacityProbe` sample set in the same run to quantify whether collapse-only branching differs at the same owner chain.
candidates.next_discriminating_check: At `LogRowCardView`, compare one expand and one collapse session at `detailFrameHeight/detailVisibilityGateOpen/detailTargetOpacity` ownership points to confirm collapse path closes the gate before animatable opacity can remain visually active.
